_comment: Pre-recorded failsafe used during demos when the live pipeline is unavailable. The audio file lives at apps/api/assets/demo-failsafe.mp3. Replace `transcript` with the EXACT script of that clip so the on-screen caption matches what is spoken. `callerName`/`voice` are cosmetic labels shown in the UI; `outcome`/`collected` populate the live-outcome panel so the failsafe looks like a real, completed turn.
transcript: Namaste, Madhusudan family se baat ho rahi hai. Aapke order ki jaankari ke liye dhanyavaad. Main aapki request register kar raha hoon aur hamari team aapse jald hi sampark karegi.
